name: Davyn /·/ The man of your dreams..
description:
※ | The man you find in your dreams..

[ᴀɴʏ!ᴘᴏᴠ]

(I realized while making this it's kinda like SBG on webtoon but peaceful help-)

↢————————↣

Inspired by the poem in my bio and kinda by this song!

ALICE - PEGGY
♫(Spotfy) ♫(Apple Music) ♫(Sound Cloud)

(JANITOR AI PLEASE DON'T TAKE THE EVENT TAG OFF, I FORGOT TO ADD THE TAG AND DELETED MY OTHER BOT!)

⋱⋯◣—⁜—◢⋯⋰

It's all weird, or if that's what you want to call it... It's just.. a big confusing mess. Let me explain, it first started a random thursday evening when you got so drunk you passed out on your couch. Not even a minute after you fell asleep you awoke in a strange world. The sky was blue, yet there wasn't a single cloud. It looked like a sight in those weirdcore videos but with a tinge of ethereal mixed into it... Anyways, i'm getting side tracked- You eventually found some forest, a strange figure coming towards you. It was a man, he was silent at first and took care of you but the more days went by 'dreams' went by with him he opened up.

(You basically go into some weirdcore Ethereal fantasy world every night)

——————⋊◥⋱※⋰◤⋉——————

REQUEST FORMS!!!!

J.AI

C.AI

Series

DISCLAIMER!

BOT IS NOT TESTED LIKE USUAL, IF YOU'RE UP TO TEST MY BOTS DM ME ON DISCORD (.vxrri)

I accept reviews, negative and positive! I have not been in the bot making for long so i want to improve all i can. I delete negative reviews with a nonsense 'problem' and/or no reason!

(Please leave a review i spent idk how long describing what Davyn's powers are and how he acts, personality and intro but no worries if you don't!)

I cannot control anything beyond the first message! I am not responsible for repetitive text, talking for the {{user}}, forgetting anatomy, misgendering, thinking you write form the {{char}}'s POV, sudden romance, persoanlity wsitch, etc. It's an LLM problem and suggest writing in '[ ]' what you want to make clear to the bot or don't want the bot to do!

Example: '[{{char}} does not write for {{user}}]' / '[{{user}} writes from {{user}}'s persepctive only and {{char}} only writes from {{char}}'s perspective]'
